hero.title: Chin Filler That Makes Your Whole Face Look
hero.desc: Not just adding volume. We create facial harmony with artistic precision and medical expertise.
hero.glass1: 1 cc is the sweet spot — but your face tells the real story
hero.glass2: Balance your nose and jawline without surgery
hero.glassQuote: "The chin anchors the lower face. Small change, big impact."

understanding.title: What is Chin Filler?
understanding.desc: A non-surgical treatment where dermal filler is placed into specific points of the chin to improve projection, shape, and overall facial harmony.

goals.title: Real-Life Goals,
goals.concern1: My chin looks weak in side photos
goals.concern2: My jawline looks soft, but I don't want surgery
goals.concern3: I have a double chin in photos
goals.note: Chin filler can address these concerns by improving the front "anchor" of your lower face.

planning.title: Chin Filler is Geometry, Not Just Volume
planning.desc: At Nexus Clinic KL, every treatment begins with understanding your unique facial architecture.
planning.point2: How your chin moves when you talk

fillers.title: Premium Fillers for Premium Results
fillers.desc: We use only authentic Allergan Juvederm fillers, ensuring safety and natural-looking results.
fillers.priceNote: *Prices are promotional and subject to change. Consultation determines exact needs.

volume.title: How Many CC Do You Need?
volume.desc2: But every face tells its own story. Some need less, some need more. That's why consultation is key.

process.title: The Nexus Experience
process.step1Desc: We confirm shape goals and safety points
process.sessionNote: Session typically takes less than 30 minutes with immediate results

expect.title: What to Expect
expect.aftercareDesc: Return to daily life same day. For best results:
expect.aftercare4: Don't press or rest chin on hand
expect.durationDesc: Varies by filler type, technique, and metabolism
expect.safetyDesc: Common side effects: swelling, tenderness, mild redness, bruising (settle in days)
expect.safetyNote: Rare risks exist — product authenticity and injector skill matter

compare.title: Chin Filler vs Other Options
compare.option3Desc: For fat under chin, can combine with filler

faq.a1: Most feel pressure and mild discomfort. Numbing helps.
faq.q2: How long does chin filler last?
faq.a2: 12 to 24 months, depending on filler type and metabolism.
faq.a3: Return to normal quickly. Mild swelling/bruising may last days.
faq.a4: Yes with experienced medical professional using approved products.
faq.a5: Nexus Clinic: Juvederm from RM 2,200 per 1 cc.
faq.a6: Yes, if hyaluronic acid filler is used.

cta.title: Ready to Plan Your Chin Filler in Kuala Lumpur?
cta.desc: Start with a proper assessment. The best results come from the right product, the right amount, and the right placement.
